stem: Choose the best description of networking.

correct_answer_json: {"choice":"internet is network; web is application"}

stem: Choose the best description of intranet.

correct_answer_json: {"choice":"private organisational network"}

stem: Select the accurate option for Wi-Fi.

stem: Choose the best description of Bluetooth.

correct_answer_json: {"choice":"short-range wireless technology"}

stem: Which option is correct for optical fibre?

stem: Select the accurate option for optical fibre bandwidth.

stem: Select the accurate option for router function.

stem: Which option is correct for ring topology?

correct_answer_json: {"accepted":["switch","network switch","wired connection to switch","devices connect to a switch with ethernet cables","ethernet cable to switch"]}
explanation: In wired LANs, Ethernet cabling links network devices to switches.

stem: Fill the gap: A NIC allows a device to ____ and communicate on a network.
options_json: null
correct_answer_json: {"accepted":["connect","join","connect to and communicate on a network","allows device to connect to a network","network connection and communication"]}
explanation: A network interface card provides the hardware interface for network access.

stem: Fill the gap: In a bus topology, the main cable is called the ____.
options_json: null
correct_answer_json: {"accepted":["backbone","backbone cable","main cable in bus network","main cable","bus main cable"]}
explanation: All devices in a bus topology connect to the backbone cable.
source_ref: U1 DT 2023 Q7(b)(iii), 2025 Q13 + MS; Network_Technologies_Notes.docx

stem: Fill the gap: A ____ is fitted at each end of a bus cable.
options_json: null
correct_answer_json: {"accepted":["terminator","terminators","stop signal bounce on bus cable","stops signal returning down the backbone","absorbs signal to reduce collisions"]}
explanation: Terminators absorb signals at cable ends to reduce distortion and data loss.

stem: Fill the gap: A closed-loop network is a ____ topology.
options_json: null
correct_answer_json: {"accepted":["ring","ring topology"]}
explanation: In ring topology, each node is connected in a closed path.

stem: Fill the gap: A network with one backbone cable is a ____ topology.
options_json: null
correct_answer_json: {"accepted":["bus","bus topology","bus network"]}
explanation: Bus topology is identified by a shared backbone cable.

stem: Fill the gap: A network with one central connection point is a ____ topology.
options_json: null
correct_answer_json: {"accepted":["star","star topology","star network"]}
explanation: Star topology uses a central node and separate device links.
source_ref: U1 DT 2019 Q6(d)(i), 2024 Q6(a) + MS; Network_Technologies_Notes.docx

stem: Fill the gap: One advantage of networking is ____ files and hardware.
options_json: null
correct_answer_json: {"accepted":["sharing","share","share files hardware and communication","share files and hardware","share software and communicate","access files from any networked computer"]}
explanation: Typical network benefits are resource sharing and easier collaboration.
source_ref: U1 DT 2019 Q6(a)(ii), 2025 Q8(d) + MS; Network_Technologies_Notes.docx

stem: Fill the gap: In a ring network, data passes from one ____ to another.
options_json: null
correct_answer_json: {"accepted":["node","workstation","device","data passes from one node/workstation to another","data passes workstation to workstation","data travels around the ring through each node"]}
explanation: Ring topology sends data around the loop via each connected node.
source_ref: U1 DT 2023 Q7(c), 2022 Q7(a) + MS; Network_Technologies_Notes.docx

stem: Match each item to the correct term or definition.
options_json: {"pairs":[{"left":"Backbone cable fails","right":"Bus communication fails"},{"left":"Single workstation fails in star","right":"Other nodes usually continue"},{"left":"Central device fails in star","right":"Whole star may stop"},{"left":"Cable/node fails in ring","right":"Ring can be disrupted"}],"choices":["Bus communication fails","Other nodes usually continue","Whole star may stop","Ring can be disrupted","No effect on any topology"]}
correct_answer_json: {"pairs":{"Backbone cable fails":"Bus communication fails","Single workstation fails in star":"Other nodes usually continue","Central device fails in star":"Whole star may stop","Cable/node fails in ring":"Ring can be disrupted"}}
explanation: Bus depends on its backbone, star isolates single workstation faults but depends on the central device, and ring can be disrupted by single faults.
source_ref: U1 DT 2019 Q6(d), 2022 Q7(a), 2023 Q7(b), 2024 Q6(a) + MS; Network_Technologies_Notes.docx

stem: Match each item to the correct term or definition.
options_json: {"pairs":[{"left":"Main cable","right":"Backbone"},{"left":"End component","right":"Terminator"},{"left":"Connected device","right":"Node/Workstation"},{"left":"Typical issue if overloaded","right":"Collisions"}],"choices":["Switch","Collisions","Node/Workstation","Terminator","Backbone"]}
correct_answer_json: {"pairs":{"Main cable":"Backbone","End component":"Terminator","Connected device":"Node/Workstation","Typical issue if overloaded":"Collisions"}}
explanation: A bus network uses a backbone with terminators, connected nodes, and can suffer collisions.

stem: Match each item to the correct term or definition.
options_json: {"pairs":[{"left":"Global network of networks","right":"Internet"},{"left":"Collection of linked web pages","right":"WWW"},{"left":"Private organisational network","right":"Intranet"},{"left":"Physical connected devices online","right":"IoT"}],"choices":["Internet","WWW","Intranet","IoT","LAN"]}

stem: Order a simple star-network setup and check routine.

stem: Order the main steps for connecting a new wired workstation to a LAN.

stem: Order the best process for accessing company cloud files while travelling.
options_json: {"items":["Download or edit required files","Open cloud service","Enable mobile data","Connect to 5G service"]}
correct_answer_json: {"order":["Enable mobile data","Connect to 5G service","Open cloud service","Download or edit required files"]}

stem: Order the steps to connect a smart TV to a home network.

correct_answer_json: {"order":["Turn on Wi-Fi on the TV","Select home network SSID","Enter network credentials","Confirm connection and test streaming"]}

stem: Order a sensible response after a bus network stops communicating.
options_json: {"items":["Repair/replace faulty cable component","Retest communication","Inspect terminators at both ends","Check whether backbone cable is damaged"]}
correct_answer_json: {"order":["Check whether backbone cable is damaged","Inspect terminators at both ends","Repair/replace faulty cable component","Retest communication"]}

stem: Order the process for adding a new workstation to a star network.

correct_answer_json: {"order":["Run cable from new workstation","Connect to central switch/server","Configure workstation network settings","Test communication"]}

stem: Order these statements from infrastructure to service use.
options_json: {"items":["Internet provides global connectivity","Users view web content","Browsers request pages","Web servers host linked pages"]}
correct_answer_json: {"order":["Internet provides global connectivity","Web servers host linked pages","Browsers request pages","Users view web content"]}

stem: Order the clues to identify a bus topology in a diagram question.

correct_answer_json: {"order":["Spot one shared main cable","Check nodes connect to that cable","Look for terminators at both ends","Conclude it is a bus topology"]}

stem: Order the data path in a typical wired LAN reaching the internet.
options_json: {"items":["Switch forwards packet in LAN","Remote service responds","Device sends packet via NIC","Router forwards packet to internet"]}
correct_answer_json: {"order":["Device sends packet via NIC","Switch forwards packet in LAN","Router forwards packet to internet","Remote service responds"]}

stem: Order this reasoning chain about why fibre is often chosen.
options_json: {"items":["Choose fibre-optic medium","Transmit data as light","Need high-capacity reliable link","Gain high bandwidth and low interference"]}
correct_answer_json: {"order":["Need high-capacity reliable link","Choose fibre-optic medium","Transmit data as light","Gain high bandwidth and low interference"]}

source_ref: U1 DT 2022 Q8(d), 2023 Q6(a) + MS; Network_Technologies_Notes.docx

stem: Order a basic smart-home device connection flow.
options_json: {"items":["Send/receive data over internet","Power on IoT device","Connect device to home network","Link device to control app"]}
correct_answer_json: {"order":["Power on IoT device","Connect device to home network","Link device to control app","Send/receive data over internet"]}
explanation: IoT devices rely on network connection before they can exchange data online.

stem: A school network only covers one building. Which option best describes this network type?
options_json: {"choices":["Ring","LAN","WAN","Intranet"]}
correct_answer_json: {"choice":"LAN"}

stem: A company links offices in Belfast and Derry. Which option best describes the network type?
options_json: {"choices":["LAN","WAN","Intranet","Bus"]}
correct_answer_json: {"choice":"WAN"}
explanation: A WAN connects networks over large geographical areas.

stem: Staff can access an internal site, but the public cannot. Which option is correct?
options_json: {"choices":["Internet","Intranet","IoT","WWW"]}
correct_answer_json: {"choice":"Intranet"}
explanation: An intranet is a private organisational network for authorised users.

stem: A student opens linked pages in a browser. Which option names this service running on the internet?

correct_answer_json: {"choice":"World Wide Web"}

stem: A smart thermostat sends data online so it can be monitored remotely. Which option describes this?
options_json: {"choices":["Bus topology","IoT","WAN","Intranet"]}
correct_answer_json: {"choice":"IoT"}

stem: A student links wireless headphones to a phone. Which option is the most suitable communication technology?
options_json: {"choices":["Bluetooth","Fibre-optic","5G","Wi-Fi"]}
correct_answer_json: {"choice":"Bluetooth"}

stem: A smart TV is being connected to the home network in the living room. Which option is best?
options_json: {"choices":["Bluetooth","Wi-Fi","5G","Backbone cable"]}
correct_answer_json: {"choice":"Wi-Fi"}

stem: An employee needs cloud files while travelling between sites. Which option is most suitable?
options_json: {"choices":["Bluetooth","Terminator","Wi-Fi","5G"]}
correct_answer_json: {"choice":"5G"}

stem: A business needs a high-capacity fixed link from LAN to internet. Which option is most suitable?
options_json: {"choices":["Wi-Fi","Bluetooth","Fibre-optic","5G"]}
correct_answer_json: {"choice":"Fibre-optic"}

stem: A school must connect its internal network to the internet. Which device option is required?
options_json: {"choices":["Router","Switch","NIC","Terminator"]}

stem: In a wired LAN, each workstation needs to connect to a central LAN device. Which option is correct?
options_json: {"choices":["File server","Router","Backbone","Switch"]}
correct_answer_json: {"choice":"Switch"}

stem: A computer cannot join the network until one hardware component is present. Which option is it?
options_json: {"choices":["NIC","WAN","Router","Terminator"]}
correct_answer_json: {"choice":"NIC"}

stem: A school wants central storage so all staff can access shared files. Which option is best?
options_json: {"choices":["Router","NIC","Switch","File server"]}

stem: In a bus topology, the main cable breaks. Which option best describes what happens next?

correct_answer_json: {"choice":"Communication across the bus network fails"}

stem: A teacher labels both ends of a bus cable. Which option explains the role of these end components?
options_json: {"choices":["They store shared files","They route internet traffic","They stop signal bounce/return on the cable","They increase wireless range"]}
correct_answer_json: {"choice":"They stop signal bounce/return on the cable"}
explanation: Terminators absorb the signal and reduce bounce/collision issues.

stem: One workstation in a star network fails. Which option is most accurate?

correct_answer_json: {"choice":"Other workstations can usually continue"}

stem: The central switch/server in a star topology fails. Which option is most accurate?

correct_answer_json: {"choice":"The network can fail because the central point is critical"}

stem: A node or cable fails in a ring network. Which option best matches this risk?

correct_answer_json: {"choice":"The ring can be disrupted"}

stem: Which option correctly distinguishes internet and World Wide Web?

stem: A student is labelling a bus topology diagram. Which option lists essential labels?

stem: Which option about fibre-optic transmission is correct?

stem: A company needs a high-bandwidth medium. Which option is most suitable from this topic?

stem: Which option best describes interception risk on fibre compared with copper?
